title: What Scripture Actually Says About Ambition (It's Not What You Think)
caption:
Wanting more isn't the sin. Wanting more without God is.

Somewhere men got taught that ambition is suspect — that a humble man doesn't reach for things. But that's not what Jesus said about the man who buried his talent. He didn't call him modest. He called him wicked.

Here's what Scripture actually says:

Ambition in the right hands is stewardship. Work done with your whole effort is worship. But ambition detached from God turns into a hunger that eats everything — and what you'd sacrifice to get there is the tell.

"Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord." — Colossians 3:23.

Be ambitious. Just make sure the thing you're reaching for is worth having.

Save this if you've been calling your fear of failure "humility."

#faith #christianmen #discipline #thework #godlymen #manofgod #ambition #scripture #christianity #theethosapp
theme: He works. The 20s are for getting built.
